SolarX

Limited (TBC)

Commercial Solar Leasing

solarx.bm

Active Development
−

Commercial solar leasing for large buildings across Bermuda. Two revenue streams: margin on deployed lease capital (3% of deployed capital) and introducer fees from technology and installation partners (c.2% of order value). Partnering with BELCO's grid modernisation programme.

Deployed Lease Capital (2030)
$20M
3% margin = $600K revenue
Introductions Target (2030)
$5M
c.2% fee = c.$100K revenue
Combined 2030 Revenue
$700K
Lease margin + introducer fees

BBS Platform

ISAC

ISAC Incorporation Platform

bbsplatform.com

Live Platform
−

A digital-first platform (bbsplatform.com) enabling streamlined incorporation of Innovative Segregated Accounts Companies (ISACs) in Bermuda, targeting fintech, insurtech and digital asset ventures. 5-year model projects 119 cumulative companies, $357K Y5 revenue and 73% annualised IRR on $70K capital.

Businesses on Platform (2030)
119
Per 5-year cohort model
Year 5 Net Revenue
$357K
Year 5 EBITDA
$89K
73% annualised IRR

Q2 2026Second cohort intake, onboarding refinement
Q3 2026Third cohort, legal partner network build
Q4 2026Fourth cohort, 20 companies by year-end
2027Scale to 6 cohorts/year, breakeven by Q2

Key Next Steps

1Onboard first 5-company cohort (Q1 2026)
2Refine bbsplatform.com onboarding UX
3Build legal partner referral network
4Secure $70K PRI funding (preferred option)
5Develop ISAC vs LTD content marketing (25.6% cost savings)

CoLab

Charity (TBC)

Co-Working & Collaboration Space

ignitebermuda.com/colab

Trading
−

A purpose-built co-working and collaboration hub in Hamilton, designed to serve Bermuda's growing startup and remote-work community. A physical anchor for the Business X ecosystem and Ignite alumni.

Cumulative Saved by Tenants by March 2026
$480K

90%
Net Profit Target

Pre-launch: All spaces currently at 0% as CoLab is in planning phase. Target is 80% occupancy within 12 months of launch, supporting up to 50 entrepreneurs across offices, hot desks, studio, and board room facilities.

Timeline

Q1 2026Location scouting & feasibility study
Q2 2026Lease negotiation & fit-out design
Q3 2026Build-out & pre-launch memberships
Q4 2026Soft launch (founding members)
Q1 2027Full launch & community programming

Key Next Steps

1Complete Hamilton location shortlist (3 sites)
2Financial model: fit-out costs vs membership revenue
3Survey Ignite alumni for demand validation
4Develop membership tier structure
5Identify anchor tenants for pre-commitments
